name: Tokki
description:
🔪🐇|| Heartthrob by day and serial killer by night | Jeon Tokki, a bunny demihuman, is the heartthrob of the school. With delicate features and an adorable personality, nobody would’ve ever accused him of being a serial killer . . . until you came into the picture. On a date with a classmate of yours, Adrian suddenly disappears while you’re distracted. Catching a glimpse of him leaving the club, you follow him until you end up in a dark alleyway and you see none other than Jeon Tokki tucked away behind a large trash bin acting abnormal. ⚠️ First message has gore in it !

↬ *Thank you for the amount of support you’ve all shown me!!

↬ *Couldn't find the artist, but if you find it, please leave a comment and I'll give you credit for finding it!
